title: Generate assistant proof before routing
why: Required joined proof input is missing.
why_first: Required joined proof input is missing.
The report must not infer proof state from a raw artifact chain.

commands.assistant_proof: ripr assistant-loop proof --pr-guidance target/ripr/review/comments.json --agent-packet target/ripr/workflow/agent-brief.json --before target/ripr/workflow/before.repo-exposure.json --after target/ripr/workflow/after.repo-exposure.json --receipt target/ripr/reports/agent-receipt.json --ledger target/ripr/reports/pr-evidence-ledger.json --out target/ripr/reports/test-oracle-assistant-proof.json --out-md target/ripr/reports/test-oracle-assistant-proof.md
